AgentActionType.title: AgentActionType
AgentActionType.description:
v0.1 confirmable write actions: the four work_items low_write tools plus the two
intake low_write tools (M6). Read tools (search / summary / list) execute directly and
never become an AgentAction.

AiConnectionOut.title: AiConnectionOut
AiConnectionOut.description:
Masked, read-only view of the multirag connection (.env-driven, D7). The API token is
NEVER returned in plaintext — only whether it is configured and a masked tail.

IntakeAcceptIn.title: IntakeAcceptIn
IntakeAcceptIn.description:
Overrides applied to the converted work item; unset fields fall back to the AI
suggestions, then to defaults (type=task, priority=medium).

ProfileUpdateIn.title: ProfileUpdateIn
ProfileUpdateIn.description: Settings Lite: the only self-editable profile field in v0.1 (password/avatar deferred).

RiskLevel.title: RiskLevel
RiskLevel.description: AI action risk (D4). Shared semantics with MCP tags / AgentAction (M5).
